channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Blue Jays infielder Bo Bichette not in starting lineup for Game 2 of World Series against Dodgers
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Toronto Blue Jays infielder Bo Bichette is not in the starting lineup for Game 2 of the World Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: IAN HARRISON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Shiffrin takes “monumental step” with 4th place as US ski team shines in World Cup opener
item.description: SÖLDEN, Austria (AP) — Very much used to winning World Cup races, Mikaela Shiffrin could hardly be more pleased with finishing fourth in the Alpine skiing season opener on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: ERIC WILLEMSEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Justin Fields to start at QB for Jets with Tyrod Taylor ruled out against Bengals
item.description: After a week of secrecy and speculation, the mystery surrounding who'll start at quarterback for the New York Jets is over. It'll be Justin Fields on Sunday against the Bengals. The team announced Saturday that Tyrod Taylor was ruled out with a knee injury and wasn't making the trip to Cincinnati.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Justin Herbert goes viral for saving Madison Beer from flying basketball at Lakers game amid romance rumors
item.description: Chargers quarterback Justin Herbert went viral for protecting rumored girlfriend Madison Beer from a basketball at a Lakers game. The appearance seemingly confirmed dating rumors.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL fines Giants, coach Brian Daboll and rookie Cam Skattebo for violating concussion protocols
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The NFL levied three fines totaling $315,000 against the New York Giants on Friday for violating concussion protocol by peeking into a medical tent to check on injured quarterback Jaxson Dart during an in-game evaluation two weeks ago.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former Raider Doug Martin dies in Oakland police custody
item.description: Police said Martin became unresponsive after he was taken into custody and later died at an area hospital. He was 36 years old.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, NewsNation

item.title: Donato scores in OT, Blackhawks edge Ducks 2-1 in Quenneville's return to Chicago
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Ryan Donato scored from the edge of the crease at 2:58 of overtime and the Chicago Blackhawks beat Anaheim 2-1 on Sunday night in Ducks coach Joel Quenneville's first game at United Center since being banned in a sexual assault scandal.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Real Salt Lake clinches playoff spot after 2-2 draw
item.description: ST. LOUIS (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake has extended its MLS playoff streak to five straight years, but just barely. After racing out to a 2-0 lead at St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
